---
title: "Gervasio Castro Morais Magaia"
description: "Sou doutorando em Engenharia Civil com foco em geotecnia."
about:
  template: trestles
  image: PXL_20251231_153601847.PORTRAIT.ORIGINAL.jpg
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      url: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gervasio-castro-m-magaia-a37717238
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      url: https://github.com/Gervasio2026/PPEC0039
    - icon: orcid
      text: Orcid
      url: https://orcid.org/0009-0004-4406-5815
    - icon: lattes
      text: Lattes
      url: http://lattes.cnpq.br/1081392997196173
    - icon: py-researchgate
      text: ResearchGate
      url: http://lattes.cnpq.br/1081392997196173
---
